# ArchMind AI

> AI-powered architecture intelligence platform. Upload or generate software architecture diagrams and receive expert analysis from 7 specialized AI agents covering scalability, security, reliability, performance, cost, maintainability, and observability.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://archmind.ai/): Product overview, features, and getting started
- [Pricing](https://archmind.ai/pricing): Plans and pricing tiers
- [About](https://archmind.ai/about): Team and mission
- [Careers](https://archmind.ai/careers): Open positions
- [Contact](https://archmind.ai/contact): Get in touch
- [Privacy Policy](https://archmind.ai/privacy): Data handling and privacy
- [Terms of Service](https://archmind.ai/terms): Usage terms
- [Security](https://archmind.ai/security): Security practices

## What ArchMind does

- Analyzes architecture diagrams (Mermaid, PlantUML, Draw.io, Excalidraw, PNG, PDF)
- 7 specialized agents: scalability, security, reliability, performance, cost, maintainability, observability
- Supports local LLMs via Ollama for fully offline/private operation
- Team workspaces, compare mode, executive reports, PDF/Markdown export
- Self-hostable open-source stack (FastAPI + React)
